name: Pyrrha Nikos
description: Pyrrha is a student of Beacon Academy, and a member of Team JNPR. She is a composed and collected individual who, despite being a celebrity, is modest and patient around other people, making her very sociable. Additionally, she tends to be quite formal. In addition to her impressive strength and vast range of combat abilities, she is a quick thinker, knowing her limits and assessing her opponents before acting. Her weapon of choice, called Miló, is a red-and-bronze spear-like weapon that can tra

name: Rinka Hayami
description: She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Rinka is a very stoic, businesslike and professional girl who has been compared to a working adult along with Chiba. As a result of her serious demeanor, she can be quite straightforward and direct.

name: Ryouji Fujioka
description: Haruhi's father works at an okama (cross dressing) bar. He says that he was originally bisexual, but turned to cross-dressing after his wife's death because he could never love another woman. In contrast to Haruhi's practicality and lack of interest in material things, he is rather bad with money, and buys girly clothing for Haruhi in the hopes of getting her to dress more cutely. Haruhi's stubborn self-reliance causes her father to worry about her a lot; he would like to be more involved in her

name: Seiko Shinohara
description: __Height:__ 154 cm (5'1") Seiko is an extremely cheerful and energetic girl who enjoys playing around with her friends. She often comes across as immature and crass, and makes over-the-top outbursts that surprise everyone around her, but her friends are able to put up with it.

name: Siesta
description: __Height:__ 162 cm A maid at the academy. She has a crush on Saito, and treats him very kindly. ~! It is revealed later that Siesta is actually descended from a World War II Japanese pilot, which explains why she has hair and eyes like Saito's. !~

name: Vodka
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Vodka is a delinquent horse girl who is determined to live the cool life, no matter where the road of life takes her. One of the most notable attributes about her is her eternal rivalry with her roommate and fellow Team Spica member, Daiwa Scarlet. The two are like cats and dogs, always bickering and competing against each other to determine who is the best among them. It's almost rare to see them agree on one thing with each other.

name: Xion
description: Xion is a new member introduced in Kingdom Hearts 358/2 Days. Xion was first shown in trailers for the new game and has also made brief appearances in demonstrations. She was first believed to have been Naminé, but Nomura later informed the press that it was a different character. ~!Xion is an imperfect replica of Sora created by Xemnas in case Sora turned out to be useless to the Organization's plans. She was part of an intended series of replicas (her name being an anagram of her initia

name: Akane Nishimura
description: Akane is a 5th grade girl with a withdrawn and slightly backward personality. She is called "Shinigami" by everyone in her class and she is teased. She is nervous about Takada-kun who keeps coming back without knowing the circumstances.

name: Aoi Hyoudou
description: __Height:__ 153 cm Satsuki's nephew, the son of Satsuki's older brother, and a junior high school student who enjoys dressing like a girl. He likes "cute things", and being the center of attention. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Catherine Ward
description: __Height:__ 176cm (5'8"); 166cm (5'4") without boots An ex-prison guard in charge of floor B3 of the building, thoroughly devoted to her role as a self-proclaimed judge and executioner, guided by her twisted sense of justice. A cheerful and sassy sadomasochist who enjoys torturing those sent to her using elaborate traps and challenges in order to create a game show-like spectacle for her own entertainment. She views Zack as an exemplary sinner, attempting to punish him thoroughly for her amuseme

name: Chio Miyamo
description: A first-year high school student attending Sameshima Academy. She's a hardcore player of Western PC games. She hates to stand out, and her motto is "be less than average." Her physical strength is nothing to sneeze at. (Source: ANN)

name: Ichirou Suzuki
description: Suzuki, or Satuu, is an adult programmer who had been transported into a game-like world after falling asleep. This game-like world is strangely related to the video games he was working on. In this world of levels and skills, Suzuki has a special ability to immediately learn a skill related to the actions he takes.

name: Kaijin Hime Do-S
description: Kaijin Hime Do-S is a female dominatrix monster of the Monster Association who uses her whip to turn her opponents into love slaves. She is able to enslave the Blizzard Bunch, but Blizzard herself is able to resist.

name: Kaname Sengoku
description: He is a professional dancer and teaches ballroom dancing at Ogasawara Dance Studio. He also holds the crown for the 'latin dance' and the 'ten dance'.

name: Knives Chau
description: Chinese-Canadian high school girl and self-described "Scottaholic."

name: Koishi Komeiji
description: She is Satori Komeiji's younger sister. She wanted to avoid the hate and dislike which Satori experienced due to her mindreading abilities, so she sealed away her own Third Eye. As a result, she lost her ability to read others' hearts, but in return she gained the ability to take action unconsciously. The denizens of the underground no longer hated her, but at the same time, they never feared her and animals no longer loved her. The ability to read people's hearts also makes one's own heart stro

name: Nitocris
description: A magic queen who held the throne during the Sixth Dynasty of ancient Egypt, even if only for a short while. Strangely enough, she has the same name as an ancient Babylonian queen. It has been assumed she caused all influential men who deliberately murdered her beloved brothers to die by drowning, and then took her own life after accomplishing her revenge.

name: Ouetsu Nimaiya
description: Ouetsu is a member of the Royal Guard. He's a quite lively and energetic individual, being prone to grandiose entrances and greetings. He has a tendency of going overboard, as he portrays a certain image as to take away from the fact that he lives in a humble state.
